source_pr.title: statistics: add tests for `analyze` with dynamic partition prune mode
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

1. add tests for `analyze` with dynamic partition prune mode
2. fix a bug when merging global `topN`

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


Side effects


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
